sections.sectionTitle: Thu Uppih Mite Huhna ding Sumpi

verses.text: Tu-in Judea gama om Pasian mite huhna ding sum kaihkhopna ding thu tawh kisai-in: Galatia gama pawlpite in a hihding zia uh ka gen bangin note in zong na hih un
Kei ka hong pai ciangin sumpi kaihkhop tawm a omlohna dingin na ngahna uh tawh kizui-in Nipi simin na tuamkoih un la, na na khol un
Kei ka hong tun' ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah na huhna uh sumte a puak dingin hoih na sak uh mite sawlin, lai tawh i paisak ding hi
Keimahmah zong ka va pai ding hoih i sak leh amaute tawh ka va paikhawm ding hi.
Masedonia gam nawkin khualzin sawm ka hih manin tua gamsung ka zin khit ciangin no kiangah ka hong pai ding hi
Note kiang panin mundang ka zinna ding peuhpeuhah kei na hong huh theihna dingun note kiangah tomno sung bek hiloin phalbi hun sung tawntung bang ka hong taamthei khading hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong thukimpih nak leh khualzin kawmin a hong nawk bek hiloin, note kiangah hun hoihkhop khat ka om nuam hi
Ahi zongin hih Efesa khua mahah Pentekos Pawi hun ciangdong ka om ding hi
Hong langpang tampi a om tei hangin limtakin na septheihna ding lam tampi tak a om hi
Note kiangah Timoti hong pai zenzen khak leh, amah pen keimah bangin Topa' na a sem ahih manin nuam a sak theihtheihna dingin na bawl un

Kuamah in na simmawhbawl kha kei un la, kei kiang a hong tun'kik theihna dingin nuamtakin a khualzin a hong zoptheihna dingin na huh un. Thu uppih i sanggam dangte tawh kei kiangah a hong pai dingin ka lamet ahi hi

I sanggam Apollos ahih leh, thu uppih sanggam dangte tawh no kiangah hong hawhna dingin ka hanthot zel hangin tu tadihin hong hawhpah ding lungtungzo nailo hi. Ahi zongin hunhoih a ngah peuhpeuh ciangin hong pai ding hi.
Kiging tawntungin na upna uhah kip un la, thahatin hang un
Na sepna khempeuh uhah ki-itna tawh na gamta un
Sanggamte aw, Stefanas-te innkuan pen Akhaia gamsunga thu um masa pente ahihna leh Pasian' mite-a' dingin nasem dingin a kipia mite ahihna thu na thei uh hi
Tua bang mite leh amaute tawh tua bangmahin na a semkhawm mite' thu na man'na dingun ka hong thum hi
Stefanas, Fortunatas, leh Akhaikas-te hong paina hangin ka nuam mahmah hi. Note tawh ka kimuh mah tawh hong kibangsak a
note hong lungnopsak mah bangin kei zong ka lung hong nuamsak hi. Hih bang mite, limtakin na phawk ding uh ahi hi
Asia gama om pawlpi a tuamtuamte in note hopihna kam hong khak uh hi. Aquila leh Prisilla-te in zong amau' inn-a kikhawm pawlpite tawh Topa' hangin lungsim taktak tawh hopihna kam hong khak uh hi
Hih lai-ah a om thu upna sungah i sanggamte khempeuh in zong hopihna kam hong khak uh hi. A siangtho kinapna tawh note khatlekhat na kihopih un
Keimah Paul in ka hong hopih hi, Hahi cihna kamte ka khut mahmah tawh ka gelh ahi hi
Topa a itlo mi peuhmah in samsiatna ngah ta hen. I Topa hong pai ta hen
Topa Jesuh hong hehpihna thupha, note tungah hong tung ta hen
Jesuh Khrih sungah note ka hong itna, note tungah hong kip ta hen. Amen.
